query: SELECT e.paymentId, e.eventType, e.userId as eventUserId, e.occurredAt, m.mandateId, m.userId as mandateUserId FROM gc_payment_events e LEFT JOIN gc_mandates m ON e.mandateId = m.mandateId ORDER BY e.occurredAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute SELECT e.paymentId, e.eventType, e.userId as eventUserId, e.occurredAt, m.mandateId, m.userId as mandateUserId FROM gc_payment_events e LEFT JOIN gc_mandates m ON e.mandateId = m.mandateId ORDER BY e.occurredAt DESC LIMIT 10;
